recommendations.title: The Horseman on the Roof
recommendations.overview: In a time of war and disease, a young officer gallantly tries to help a young woman find her husband.

recommendations.title: Resistance
recommendations.overview: The story of mime Marcel Marceau as he works with a group of Jewish boy scouts and the French Resistance to save the lives of ten thousand orphans during World War II.

recommendations.title: Never Rarely Sometimes Always
recommendations.overview: A pair of teenage girls in rural Pennsylvania travel to New York City to seek out medical help after an unintended pregnancy.

recommendations.title: You Don't Know Jack
recommendations.overview: Controversy and legal problems follow Dr. Jack Kevorkian as he advocates assisted suicide.

recommendations.title: The Innocents
recommendations.overview: Poland, 1945. Mathilde, a young French Red Cross doctor, is on a mission to help the war survivors. When a nun seeks for her help, she is brought to a convent where several pregnant sisters are hiding, unable to reconcile their faith with their pregn

recommendations.title: Bad Education
recommendations.overview: A superintendent of a school district works for the betterment of the student’s education when an embezzlement scheme is discovered, threatening to destroy everything.

recommendations.title: Don't Blame the Kid
recommendations.overview: After a one-night stand results in pregnancy, a young woman decides to become partners with the emotionally immature father-to-be.

recommendations.title: The Flowers of War
recommendations.overview: A Westerner finds refuge with a group of women in a church during Japan's rape of Nanking in 1937. Posing as a priest, he attempts to lead the women to safety.

recommendations.title: Broken
recommendations.overview: Three suburban English families' lives intertwine with tragic consequences.

recommendations.title: Colonia
recommendations.overview: A young woman's desperate search for her abducted boyfriend draws her into the infamous Colonia Dignidad, a sect nobody ever escaped from.
